name: ent-bridge-compliant-neutral
note: FINAL UNIT iteration 3, the C-048 direction: a COMPLIANT page quote plus the SAME definitional glossary still entails NOTHING. The glossary is not a loosening - it lets an indirect reference compose, but a page that names no glossary term does not become a breach. The gate abstains on neutral; a clean page must never ship a positive (Rule 10 axe-core doctrine).

claims.claim: This website does advertise a prescription only medicine to the public
claims.premise: We offer general skincare consultations; please speak to your GP about any prescription treatment
claims.bridge: The following are indirect references to a prescription only medicine: wrinkle-relaxing injections, fat jab.

scripted_response.rationale: the page names no glossary term and defers any prescription to a GP; the premises do not establish the claim
